---
title: "Sample Deck"
author: "Dany Laksono"
date: "2025-09-11"
description: "Example revealjs deck in this Quarto project."
categories: [example]
---

## Getting Started

- This is a sample slide
- Edit or duplicate this to create your own

---

## Columns

:::: {.columns}
::: {.column width="40%"}
Left content
:::
::: {.column width="60%"}
Right content
:::
::::

---

## Incremental List

::: {.incremental}
- First
- Second
- Third
:::
